'''Choupek''' was a self-styled [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] who ruled a significant portion of the [[Coruscant Underworld/Legends|Coruscant underworld]]. He was guarded by at least six armed [[Unidentified Underworld species|beings]].

[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], and their [[Droid/Legends|droid]] companions hotwired and stole Choupek's [[Landspeeder/Legends|landspeeder]] during their search for the [[Columi/Legends|Columi]] [[Phelon]].

{{Char-stub}}
